name: construction project managers processing 5–15 CAD files/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 CAD files/month, inefficient documentation conversion causes delays in permit approvals. We provide a streamlined converter instead of manual conversion of CAD files.

problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of CAD files into permit packages
